lint.command: mkdir -p specs/apps/crud/contracts/generated && npx @redocly/cli bundle specs/apps/crud/contracts/openapi.yaml -o specs/apps/crud/contracts/generated/openapi-bundled.yaml && npx @redocly/cli bundle specs/apps/crud/contracts/openapi.yaml -o specs/apps/crud/contracts/generated/openapi-bundled.json && npx @stoplight/spectral-cli lint specs/apps/crud/contracts/generated/openapi-bundled.yaml --ruleset specs/apps/crud/contracts/.spectral.yaml

bundle.command: mkdir -p specs/apps/crud/contracts/generated && npx @redocly/cli bundle specs/apps/crud/contracts/openapi.yaml -o specs/apps/crud/contracts/generated/openapi-bundled.yaml && npx @redocly/cli bundle specs/apps/crud/contracts/openapi.yaml -o specs/apps/crud/contracts/generated/openapi-bundled.json

docs.command: mkdir -p specs/apps/crud/contracts/generated/docs && npx @redocly/cli bundle specs/apps/crud/contracts/openapi.yaml --config specs/apps/crud/contracts/redocly.yaml --remove-unused-components -o specs/apps/crud/contracts/generated/openapi-docs.yaml && npx @redocly/cli build-docs specs/apps/crud/contracts/generated/openapi-docs.yaml -o specs/apps/crud/contracts/generated/docs/index.html
